MINUTES
(404/MAS) PET IN PRO PER. RESP NOT PRESENT. STIP FOR PRO TEM SIGNED. PET SWORN AND TESTIFIED. PER PET, RESP TELEPHONED HER ON 8/11/00 AND INFORMED THAT HE WAS ARRESTED
BY I.N.S. AND IS WAITING IN ARIZONA FOR DEPORTATION BACK TO EL SALVADOR. COURT ORDERS, IN ABSENCE OF RESP, THAT PET SHALL HAVE SOLE P/C. RESP SHALL
G MOTION TO THIS COURT TO ATTEMPT TO GET C/V. IF COURT FINDS THAT PET UNREASONABLY WITHHELD C/V FROM RESP, COURT WILL NOT LOOK POSITIVELY UPON THAT.
CONTINUANCE SCHEDULED FOR 8/28/00 SHALL BE TAKEN O/C. COURT EXTERN ASSISTS WITH PREPARING ORDER. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY PATRICIA VAN STEENBERGE #1742
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE TEMPORARY JUDGE - MARJORIE A. SLABACH
MINUTES
(404/MAS) PARTIES IN PRO PER. RESP'S LAST NAME AKA ZELYA. STIP FOR PRO TEM SIGNED. PARTIES SWORN AND TESTIFIED. WITHOUT ADMITTING, RESP OBJECTS TO R/O. AFTER ARGUMENT A
ND SUBMISSION, THE COURT ORDERS 3YR STANDARD CONDUCT RO WITH 100 YARD STAY AWAY AGAINST RESP FOR PET, HER RESIDENCE, HER PLACE OF WORK, HER VEHICLE
TACT FOR C/V. COURT CONFIRMS C/C, C/V ORDER ENTERED 8/9/00. SINCE NEITHER PARTIES RESIDE IN S.F., COURT ORDERS VENUE CHANGED TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY.
CILIA VALDEZ #1473
